goal: Creators sign up at landing.html to co-stream HB 002 to their followers

fan_funnel_separate.note: Fan campaigns (Founding Fan, Awareness, Consideration) are NOT the influencer staircase. Run influencer layers first.

L1_see_you.creator_job: Stop scrolling — remember hologram boxing exists for streamers

ads.headline: Calling All Influencers
tiktok_texts: Calling all streamers — live stream the first AI hologram boxing event.
Creators — your next co-stream is waiting. Would you walk inside?
ads.meta_message: Calling streamers & content creators. The world's first live AI hologram boxing experience is loading — built for Kick, Twitch, YouTube, and TikTok.

ads.headline: Would You Walk Inside?
tiktok_texts: Would you walk inside? Creators — stream hologram boxing live.
Something wild is behind that door. Streamers — this is your next event.
ads.meta_message: Would you walk inside? Creators — bring your audience into the tent. AI hologram boxers. Live. Front row energy.

ads.headline: The Future Is Here
tiktok_texts: THE FUTURE OF LIVE ENTERTAINMENT... stream it live.
Premium fight night energy — built for creators who go live.
ads.meta_message: The future of live entertainment. Tent, headsets, hologram boxers going live — made for streamers.

L2_get_curious.creator_job: Understand the co-stream opportunity — tent, live FX, Kick/Twitch

ads.headline: Stream the Tent — Live FX
tiktok_texts: Your chat controls the show — live interactive effects in the tent.
Kick & Twitch creators — stream hologram boxing with live FX.
ads.meta_message: Stream the tent — live interactive effects your audience can feel. Co-stream partnerships open.

ads.headline: Co-Stream on Kick & Twitch
tiktok_texts: Watch free on Kick & Twitch — or co-stream it with us.
Streamers: bring your chat ringside to hologram boxing.
ads.meta_message: Co-stream hologram boxing on Kick & Twitch. VIP access and brand ambassador roles for partners.

ads.headline: Inside the Hologram Tent
tiktok_texts: Dark tent. Glowing square. Wireframe boxers. Your audience watches in VR.
Show your followers what's inside — inflatable tent fight night.
ads.meta_message: Inside the hologram tent — fog, glowing fight square, Wave wireframe boxers. Content gold for live streamers.

L3_sign_up.creator_job: Apply now — open call, partner form, email capture
L3_sign_up.note: EXISTING — 6 TikTok ad groups, 24 ads. Meta partial (2 ad sets live, 4 scripted).

L4_come_back.creator_job: Retarget creators who visited landing but didn't sign up
L4_come_back.audience_note: Enable when pixel has landing visitors 7d excluding Lead. TikTok retarget list / Meta custom audience.

ads.headline: Streamer Slots Filling
tiktok_texts: You looked — streamer partner slots are filling. Finish your application.
Still thinking about co-streaming hologram boxing? Sign up now.
ads.meta_message: You visited — don't miss partner slots. Co-stream hologram boxing live. Finish your application.

ads.headline: WE WANT YOU!
tiktok_texts: OPEN CALL — we still want you. Apply at hologramboxing.com
Creators — your spot is waiting. WE WANT YOU!
ads.meta_message: OPEN CALL for streamers & content creators. WE WANT YOU — apply now.

ads.headline: Don't Miss the Stream
tiktok_texts: You looked inside — bring your audience next time. Sign up.
Would you walk inside? Creator applications still open.
ads.meta_message: You looked — bring your followers ringside. Creator partner applications still open.

L5_show_up.creator_job: Urgency — event soon, last partner slots, go live with us
L5_show_up.audience_note: Turn on when HB 002 date is ≤14 days out. Sync with site countdown.

ads.headline: Last Call for Streamers
tiktok_texts: LAST CALL — streamer partner slots closing. HB 002 loading.
Final call for creators — co-stream hologram boxing before slots close.
ads.meta_message: Last call for streamers & creators. Partner slots closing — sign up before HB 002.

ads.headline: Open Call — We Want You
tiktok_texts: Open call closing soon — stream hologram boxing live. Apply now.
Creators — last chance to join the team. Sign up.
ads.meta_message: Open call closing soon. Co-stream hologram boxing — VIP access, brand ambassador roles.

ads.headline: Go Live With Us
tiktok_texts: Go live with us — interactive FX, hologram fights, your audience ringside.
Streamers — HB 002 is almost here. Sign up to co-stream.
ads.meta_message: Go live with us. Interactive effects, hologram fights, your chat ringside. Partner sign-up closing.

totals_when_complete.deployment_note: TikTok influencer staircase complete (PAUSED). Meta pending token refresh.
